Settings

Color Scheme
Custom Colors
Topic Templates
Character Templates
Text to Speech
Choose between bundled Piper and built-in system voices. Piper uses files stored inside the app under tts/piper when packaged.
Natural lightly normalizes punctuation before speech. Narration adds stronger pauses for read-aloud prose.
Uses the app's local LanguageTool server before speech when available. Strict is more aggressive.
Balanced
Controls how strongly Natural and Narration shape pauses around sentence punctuation.
Clear
Controls how long the break feels when the text moves into a new paragraph.
1x
Adjust live playback speed for Piper and system voices.
Normal
Pitch affects live playback in the app.
Play a short sample with the currently selected provider and voice.

Writing Tools
Typography, manuscript search/replace, project templates, and consistency tools.

Typography (saved in vault)

Applies to the Writing editor page layout.

Global Manuscript Search/Replace

Idle
Run a search to see results.

Consistency Check (beta)

Find likely contradictions like “did” vs “didn’t” across your draft. Best results when your characters are named consistently.
Scope
Idle
Run a check to see warnings.

Project Templates / Defaults (saved in vault)

Used when creating new scenes. You can also apply the template to an existing scene.
Insert/Edit Link
User Guide
Debug Console
Debug console ready.
Travel Time Measurement Setup
Follow route is best for roads/trails with turns. Direct line is best for "as the crow flies" estimates.
Use Standard for normal journeys, Careful for wagons/rough routes, and Forced only for short bursts.
Enter a manual mounted pace, or enable auto-calculate.
Enter how many map units a traveler covers in 1 day. Real-world baseline preset uses about 1.75x mounted pace vs walking. Results are shown as weeks, days, hours, and minutes.
Measure a route first, then enter how long that trip is known to take.
Use Measure mode to click at least 2 points, then enter the trip duration here.
Calibration route: select at least 2 map points in Measure mode.
